category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a source code spell checker.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is typos-cli; source_facts.executables lists the installed command as typos.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is intentionally not reassessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies source-code spell checking; source_facts.executables lists typos; source_facts.source-archive is from the official Rust project repository.
